GO Battle League.title: Great League and Summer Cup: Great League Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League and Summer Cup: Great League Edition will run from June 30, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to July 7, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Normal-, Fire-, Water-, Grass-, Electric-, and Bug-type Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Ultra League and Fantasy Cup: Ultra League Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Ultra League and Fantasy Cup: Ultra League Edition will run from July 7, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to July 14, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- Only Dragon-, Steel-, and Fairy-type Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Master League and Retro Cup: Great League Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Master League and Retro Cup: Great League Edition will run from July 14, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to July 21, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- All Pokémon are eligible.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Dark-, Steel-, and Fairy-type Pokémon are not eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League will run from July 21, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to July 28, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- All Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League and Master Premier | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League and Master Premier will run from July 28, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to August 4, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- No CP limit.
- Mythical and Legendary Pokémon are not eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Ultra League and Weather Cup: Great League Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Ultra League and Weather Cup: Great League Edition will run from August 4, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to August 11, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Fire-, Water-, Ice-, and Rock-type Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Master League and Evolution Cup: Great League Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Master League and Evolution Cup: Great League Edition will run from August 11, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to August 18, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- All Pokémon are eligible.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Pokémon that have evolved at least once and can evolve again will be eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League and Scroll Cup: Great League Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League and Scroll Cup: Great League Edition will run from August 18, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to August 25, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Only Water-, Fighting-, and Dark-type Pokémon are eligible.
The following Pokémon will not be allowed.
- Primarina

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League will run from August 25, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to September 1, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- All Pokémon are eligible.

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League: Mega Edition | Forever Forward
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League: Mega Edition will run from September 1, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to September 8, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- No CP limit.
- Mega-Evolved Pokémon are allowed.

Twitch Drops.title: Twitch Drops for Pokémon GO 10th Anniversary Celebration

bonuses: 10 Great Balls
10 Hyper Potions
10 Lucky Eggs
10 Max Potions
10 Max Revives
10 Poké Balls
10 Potions
10 Rare Candy
10 Rare Candy XL
10 Revives
10 Ultra Balls

Event.title: Road of Legends

bonuses: No Remote Raid Pass limit Monday, July 6, to Sunday, July 12, 2026
Party Power charges faster in raids
Premier Balls will be more effective at catching Pokémon after raids
Receive special stickers from spinning PokéStops and opening Gifts
Up to 2 free Raid Passes from spinning Photo Discs at Gyms

Event.description: The countdown to Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global starts here! During the Road of Legends, Trainers around the world can gear up for the big weekend with a full week of powerful raid encounters, event bonuses, and GO Pass rewards. Whether you’re looking to strengthen your team, stock up on rewards, or take on some of Pokémon GO’s most formidable foes, this is your chance to get ready for the adventure ahead.

Event.title: Special Anniversary Pikachu Celebration

bonuses: 2× Candy for transferring Pokémon
2× Stardust for catching Pokémon
3× Candy for transferring Pokémon
3× Stardust for catching Pokémon
Even greater chance for Trainers level 31 and up to receive Candy XL for transferring Pokémon
Increased chance for Trainers level 31 and up to receive Candy XL for transferring Pokémon
Pikachu will appear more frequently in the wild.
Pikachu will be easier to catch during the event.
spawns: Pikachu wearing a Tricks & Treats costume

Event.description:
Keep the festivities going with three celebrations of different costumed Pikachu!
The Special Anniversary Pikachu Celebration event will take place from July 13, 2026 at 10 am to July 20, 2026 at 8 pm.

Event.title: Happy Birthday, Professor Willow!
Event.description:
Wish Professor Willow a very happy birthday with Professor Willow’s assistant Pikachu!
The Happy Birthday, Professor Willow! event will take place on July 21, 2026 from 10 am to 8 pm.

Event.title: Ozone Ascent
Event.description:
Complete Timed Research to encounter Rayquaza and more!
The Ozone Ascent event will take place from July 25, 2026 at 10 am to July 26, 2026 at 8 pm.

Event.title: Hatch Day
Event.description: The Hatch Day event will take place on August 8, 2026 from 11 am to 5 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

Pokémon GO Fest.title: Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global

bonuses: 1/2 Stardust cost for all trades
Branching Timed Research with a choice between Mega Mewtwo X or Mega Mewtwo Y
Different Pokémon type-themed Field Research every hour
Global Challenges to unlock additional bonuses and Ultra Unlock events
Incense (excluding Daily Adventure Incense) will attract special Pokémon
Increased chance of encountering Shiny Pokémon
Lure Modules activated during the event will last for one hour
Open up to 50 Gifts each day
Party Play will be active for nine hours
Special Research including an encounter with Zeraora
Up to nine free Raid Passes per day by spinning Photo Discs at Gyms
Up to six Special Trades each day
spawns: Pikachu wearing a Team Instinct hat
Pikachu wearing a Team Mystic hat
Pikachu wearing a Team Valor hat
shiny: Pikachu wearing a Team Instinct hat
Pikachu wearing a Team Mystic hat
Pikachu wearing a Team Valor hat

Pokémon GO Fest.description:
Join millions of Trainers across the globe for Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global! This worldwide event takes place from July 11, 2026 at 10 am to July 12, 2026 at 7 pm local time.
For the first time, GO Fest: Global is free for all Trainers who log in during event weekend. Everyone can access the featured Special Research, event bonuses, and increased Shiny encounter opportunities at no cost.

Max Mondays.title: Dynamax Deino during Max Monday
Max Mondays.description:
These Dynamax Pokemon may appear in Max Battles throughout this season. Max Battles will be available from 6:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. local time on Mondays.
- Power Spots will refresh more frequently.
- Additional Power Spots will be active on Mondays compared to the rest of the week.
- Max Battles will rotate to feature different Dynamax Pokemon.
On July 13, 2026, the featured Dynamax Pokemon is Deino.
- Deino

Max Mondays.description:
These Dynamax Pokemon may appear in Max Battles throughout this season. Max Battles will be available from 6:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. local time on Mondays.
- Power Spots will refresh more frequently.
- Additional Power Spots will be active on Mondays compared to the rest of the week.
- Max Battles will rotate to feature different Dynamax Pokemon.

Max Mondays.description:
These Dynamax Pokemon may appear in Max Battles throughout this season. Max Battles will be available from 6:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. local time on Mondays.

- Additional Power Spots will be active on Mondays compared to the rest of the week.
- Max Battles will rotate to feature different Dynamax Pokemon.

Raid Battles.title: Mega Lucario in Mega Raids - July 13
Raid Battles.description: Mega Lucario returns to Mega Raids from July 13, 2026 at 6 am to July 14, 2026 at 10 pm local time.

There will also be a Raid Hour featuring Kyogre from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:
- July 15

Raid Battles.title: Mega Sceptile in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Sceptile will be in Mega Raids from July 15, 2026 at 6 am to July 21, 2026 at 10 pm local time.

Raid Battles.title: Mega Salamence in Mega Raids
Raid Battles.description: Mega Salamence will be in Mega Raids from July 22, 2026 at 6 am to July 28, 2026 at 10 pm local time.

Raid Battles.description:

There will also be a Raid Hour featuring Solgaleo from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:

Raid Battles.title: Shadow Palkia in Shadow Raids
Raid Battles.description:
Shadow Palkia will appear in Pokemon GO in Shadow Raids. If you’re lucky you’ll be able to encounter Shiny Shadow Palkia!
Shadow Palkia will appear in five-star Shadow Raids every weekend from July 1 to August 4.

There will also be a Raid Hour featuring Kyurem from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:
- July 29

Raid Battles.description: Mega Aggron will be in Mega Raids from July 29, 2026 at 6 am to August 4, 2026 at 10 pm local time.

Raid Hour.title: Kyogre Raid Hour
Raid Hour.description: A Raid Hour featuring Kyogre is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.

Raid Hour.title: Solgaleo Raid Hour
Raid Hour.description: A Raid Hour featuring Solgaleo is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.

Raid Hour.title: Kyurem Raid Hour
Raid Hour.description: A Raid Hour featuring Kyurem is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.

Pokémon Spotlight Hour.title: Zubat Spotlight Hour
Pokémon Spotlight Hour.description:
Pokémon Spotlight Hour will feature a different Pokémon and special bonus for one hour at 6:00 p.m. local time on Thursday.
July 16: The featured Pokémon is Zubat and the special bonus is 2× Catch XP.

Pokémon Spotlight Hour.title: Eevee Spotlight Hour
Pokémon Spotlight Hour.description:
Pokémon Spotlight Hour will feature a different Pokémon and special bonus for one hour at 6:00 p.m. local time on Thursday.
July 23: The featured Pokémon is Eevee and the special bonus is 2× Catch Candy.

Pokémon Spotlight Hour.title: Bidoof Spotlight Hour
Pokémon Spotlight Hour.description:

July 30: The featured Pokémon is Bidoof and the special bonus is 2× Transfer Candy.

Raid Day.title: Raichu Super Mega Raid Day

bonuses: An additional 5,000 Stardust from Super Mega Raids
An additional 5,000 XP from Super Mega Raids
Increased chance of encountering Shiny Raichu from Super Mega Raids
Increased chance to get Rare Candy XL from Raid Battles
Raichu caught from Super Mega Raids will have Mega Level 1 unlocked

Raid Day.description: Sparks fly for Raichu Super Mega Raid Day!

Raid Day.title: Raid Day
Raid Day.description: The Raid Day event will take place on August 22, 2026 from 2 pm to 5 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

Choose Your Path.title: Choose Your Path: Fairy Trail
Choose Your Path.description:
Choose Your Path Timed Research is a new way to play during non-event weeks, giving you the freedom to explore Pokémon GO your way!
During a Choose Your Path Timed Research week, you’ll be able to select one of three paths: Explore, Catch, or Battle. Your choice will shape the Timed Research tasks and bonuses throughout the week.
You may have different research opportunities than other Trainers.

Choose Your Path.title: Choose Your Path: Venom and Vines
Choose Your Path.description:
Choose Your Path Timed Research is a new way to play during non-event weeks, giving you the freedom to explore Pokémon GO your way!
During a Choose Your Path Timed Research week, you’ll be able to select one of three paths: Explore, Catch, or Battle. Your choice will shape the Timed Research tasks and bonuses throughout the week.
You may have different research opportunities than other Trainers.

GO Pass.title: GO Pass: July

bonuses: 2× Daily Adventure Incense duration
Hold 10 more Gifts in your Item Bag
Hold up to 20 more Gifts in your Item Bag
Increased XP and Stardust from hatching Eggs
One additional Candy for trading Pokémon
Open up to 40 Gifts per day
Open up to 50 Gifts per day
Receive up to 125 Gifts per day from spinning PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs
Receive up to 150 Gifts per day from spinning PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs
Trainers level 31 and above will receive one guaranteed Candy XL when trading Pokémon

GO Pass.description:
The Pokémon GO 10th Anniversary Celebration continues with GO Pass: July! Ho-Oh, Gimmighoul holding a 10th anniversary coin, and more await.
From Tuesday, July 7, at 10:00 a.m. to Tuesday, August 4, at 10:00 a.m. local time, the GO Pass and GO Pass Deluxe for July will be available in Pokémon GO!

Community Day.title: Nickit Community Day

bonuses: 1-hour Lures*
2x Catch Candy
2x Chance to receive Candy XL from catching Pokémon
3-hour Incense
3x Catch Stardust
Increased Spawns
One additional Special Trade can be made for a maximum of two for the day*
Trades made will require 50% less Stardust*

Community Day.description: Nickit, the Fox Pokémon, will be featured during August Community Day!

Season.title: Forever Forward

bonuses: 2× Daily Adventure Incense duration
Increased XP and Stardust from hatching Eggs
Increased limits on opening, receiving from PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs, and storing Gifts
One additional Candy for trading Pokémon

Season.description:
Welcome to Pokémon GO: Forever Forward!
In Pokémon GO, Seasons are periods of time that feature new events, Pokémon debuts, and surprises that all follow a certain theme. As the Seasons change, you may find different Pokémon appearing in your area and hatching from Eggs. Make sure to explore during each in-game Season to collect and train as many different Pokémon as you can! You’ll also enjoy special bonuses as you do.
